response.justification: Staff-level full-stack engineer with 20+ years experience and proven mastery of the primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React). Current role explicitly includes AI-agent infrastructure and MCP development, directly matching the stated requirement. Strong architectural thinking and testing culture. Minor gaps: Nest.js and Vitest not explicitly mentioned, though deep TypeScript/Node.js expertise strongly suggests quick adoption.
strengths: Staff-level full-stack engineer with direct expertise in TypeScript, Node.js, and React across recent roles
Current role includes AI-agent infrastructure and MCP—explicitly matching role requirement
Deep testing and craftsmanship focus: TDD, code organization, Docker, Kubernetes, and cloud platforms (AWS CDK)
concerns: Nest.js not explicitly mentioned; experience shows Node.js and GraphQL but not the specific framework
Vitest not listed, though testing background is strong and transfers easily
Seniority level (Staff) exceeds role's Mid-Senior positioning—potential overqualification concern
